---
title: "Uniswap V3 Impermanent Loss"
description: "Analyze the risk of providing liquidity into pools of Uniswap V3."
date: "2023-08-30"
categories: [analysis, crypto]
image: "preview.png"
format:
  html:
    mermaid:
      theme: default
---

# Introduction

Liquidity Providers (LPs) deposit assets into Uniswap's pools to earn trading fee paid by traders. It's an investing strategy. Let's call the strategy LPing.

In the period of 60 days from July 1 to August 29, 2023, Uniswap V3 TVL on Ethereum ranged between $2.3B and $2.9B. TVL was trending down from $2.8B to $2.4B.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2974812/4942750" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

What can they do with the assets instead? The simplest stategy is to hold them, let's call the stragtegy Hodling.

Compare to Hodling, the upside of LPing is earning fee. What is the downside? It's the loss of assets value, i.e. impermanent loss (IL). 

Uniswap document has a section to understand more about IL, which you can read [here](https://docs.uniswap.org/contracts/v2/concepts/advanced-topics/understanding-returns).

In this post, let's explore IL of LPing in Uniswap V3.

# Impermanent loss

## Uniswap V3

During the 60 days period, on average, IL of Uniswap V3 ranged between $59K and $1.1M per day. IL percentage ranged between 0.002% and 0.042% per day.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2974812/4942263" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

## Pool breakdown

*Pool name consists of [`Base symbol`-`Quote symbol` : `% Fee`].*

### Top TVL and volume pools

Average daily IL of top 8 TVL pools ranged between $1 (`USDC-USDT : 1%`, top stablecoins pool) and $16K (`USDC-WETH : 0.05%`, the largest TVL pool).

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982082/4945495" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

 % IL of most of the pools is either 0.001% or 0.004%. Top pools, with 0.004% IL, all consist of WETH and stablecoins. Top pools, with 0.001% IL, all consist of WETH and WBTC.

::: {.column-page-right}

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982082/4945962" width="100%" height="450"></iframe>

:::

The top TVL pools are also the top volume pools.

::: {.column-screen-inset-right}

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982261/4945909" width="100%" height="450"></iframe>

:::

### Top IL pools

Average daily IL of top IL pools ranged between $21K (`TOWN-WETH : 1%`) and $277K (`ITP-WETH : 0.3%`). None of these pools are the top TVL pools or top volume pools.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982309/4945977" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

Meanwhile, % IL ranged between 1.6% (`FUN-WETH : 1%`) and 71.4% (`USDC-UST : 1%`). Of 8 top pools, % IL of 3 pools are 20% or more, % IL of other 5 pools are 5% or less.

::: {.column-page-right}

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982309/4945976" width="100%" height="450"></iframe>

:::

## Position breakdown

In 46K+ positions openned during the period, out of every 100 positions, 39 positions had no burn (hadn't removed any provided liquidity), 17 positions were closed after multi-weeks, 13 positions were closed after 2-7 days, 3 positions had burn but not yet closed, and 28 positions were closed intraday.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2985586/4953283" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

In 12K+ intraday positions, out of every 100 positions, 42 positions were closed after over an hour, 16 positions were closed after 1 hour or less, and 42 positions were JIT, i.e. closed intrablock.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2986046/4953344" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

Next, let's examine `No burn` positions, the largest subset.

### No burn positions

In 17K+ positions, out of every 100 positions, 11 positions didn't have IL, IL of 88 postions were $100 or less.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2986639/4954804" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

#### Top TVL positions

IL of top 8 positions ranged between $0 and $20K. IL of other 13K positions were $200K+. 4K+ positions didn't have price data.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982776/4946830" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

% IL of top 8 positions were 0.169% or less. % IL of other 13K positions were 0.038%.

::: {.column-page-right}

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2982776/4946832" width="100%" height="450"></iframe>

:::

#### Top IL positions

IL of top 8 positions ranged between $3K and $63K. IL of other 13K positions were $107K+. The largest IL position and 4 others were in meme pools, i.e. pools consist of meme coins and WETH. The other 3 positions were in the largest TVL pool `USDC-WETH : 0.05%`.

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2986659/4954633" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

% IL of top 8 positions ranged between 0.042% and 4.889%. % IL of other 13K positions were 0.038%. % IL of positions in pool `USDC-WETH : 0.05%` were much smaller than those of positions in meme pools.

::: {.column-page-right}

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2986659/4954634" width="100%" height="450"></iframe>

:::
